remainingRisks: This is a local behavior dogfood, not an upstream proposal.
Future API documentation changes would require a separate graph-backed slice.
nextAllowedActions: Review the local index.js and test/index.js diff.
Inspect the graph delta before any graph-source update.
Do not modify package metadata, dependencies, README wording, benchmarks, or upstream state in this dogfood.

proposedNodeUpdates.intentClaim: index.js owns input coercion and escaping for the exported escapeHtml function.
This dogfood must not change which characters are escaped or how existing inputs are escaped.
A local behavior dogfood changes input coercion from string concatenation to explicit String(value) so Symbol inputs stringify instead of throwing.

edgeIntentSummary.claim: Replacing concatenation coercion with String(value) is the narrow code path that supports Symbol input while preserving existing stringified outputs.
The dogfood must not alter the match regex, replacement entities, public package metadata, dependencies, or upstream state.
